Discover More Destinations

Beautiful beaches, outdoor adventures, upscale shops — each destination has something special to offer. Whether you want to explore the Santa Monica Mountains in Malibu or browse the luxury shops in Hollywood Hills, we can help you find the perfect nearby rental. We have luxury rentals in LA, Beverly Hills and Malibu. Whether you’re in the area for work or visiting with your family, you’ll fall in love with our luxury homes. When you stay in our luxury villas, you can expect a safe and memorable vacation. All of our luxury residences are designed to provide a one-of-a-kind experience for all guests.

Click the destination of your choice and browse our luxury home rentals in that area!

STAY AWHILE VILLAS

Our trusted vacation rental company provides a luxury travel experience you won’t forget with our rentals in Beverly Hills, Los Angeles and Malibu. Whether you’re traveling for work or a family vacation, we look forward to hosting you in one of our luxury vacation rentals.
